title: mentha × villosa var. nicholsoniana
intro: Mentha × villosa var. nicholsoniana, also known as the Woolly Mint or Woolly Peppermint, is a unique variety of mint plant that is a hybrid of Mentha villosa and another species, characterized by its fuzzy leaves and stems. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its ability to aid digestion, ease nausea, and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Mentha × villosa var. nicholsoniana include its antimicrobial and antispasmodic properties, which can help to alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome, menstrual cramps, and other digestive issues. The herbal preparations of Mentha × villosa var. nicholsoniana include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
